title: Jacob Elordi's 2026 Golden Globes Supporting Actor Nomination
text: Jacob Elordi is nominated for Best Supporting Male Actor at the 83rd Annual Golden Globes for his role in Frankenstein. The 28-year-old Saltburn star competes against established names and fellow rising talent Paul Mescal in a competitive category. According to betting analysis, Stellan Skarsgård has emerged as the frontrunner for his work in Sentimental Value, with Benicio Del Toro as a close second. Elordi currently holds third place in the odds, ahead of Sean Penn and Paul Mescal. The category features six nominees total, including comedy veteran Adam Sandler and acclaimed actor Sean Penn. The article notes that One Battle After Another received the most nominations overall, which could benefit its supporting cast members. The piece suggests potential vote-splitting between actors from the same film could create an opening for other nominees. Elordi's nomination reflects recognition of younger talent alongside established performers, though he remains behind frontrunners who come from more heavily nominated films.
